/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/clang++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=15.0 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o libnomacs-decklink.dylib -install_name @rpath/libnomacs-decklink.dylib "CMakeFiles/nomacs-decklink.dir/nomacs-decklink_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nomacs-decklink.dir/src/DkDeckLinkPlugin.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nomacs-decklink.dir/src/DkDeckLinkViewPort.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nomacs-decklink.dir/src/DkDeckLinkOutput.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nomacs-decklink.dir/src/DkDeckLinkDialog.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nomacs-decklink.dir/vendor/DeckLinkAPI/Mac/include/DeckLinkAPIDispatch.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nomacs-decklink.dir/qrc_nomacsPlugin.cpp.o" -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,@loader_path/../../Frameworks /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets -framework CoreFoundation /Applications/nomacs.app/Contents/Frameworks/libnomacsCore-3.22.1.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
